# core.recurrence_network.RecurrenceNetwork { #ammonyte.core.recurrence_network.RecurrenceNetwork }

```python
core.recurrence_network.RecurrenceNetwork(
    matrix,
    time,
    epsilon,
    series=None,
    value_name=None,
    value_unit=None,
    time_name=None,
    time_unit=None,
    label=None,
)
```

[[source]](https://github.com/LinkedEarth/Ammonyte/blob/main/ammonyte/core/recurrence_network.py#L6-L63){.source-link target="_blank"}

Recurrence network object. Used for Recurrence Network Analysis (RNA).

Child of ammonyte.RecurrenceMatrix, so it has all of the RecurrenceMatrix methods
plus additional methods defined here
